							has_law = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
							has_law = law_type:law_presidential_republic
							has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
						}
					}
				}
				any_diplomatic_play = {
					initiator = root
					exists = c:RSM
					target = {
						this = c:RSM
						c:RSM = {
							OR = {
								has_law = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
								has_law = law_type:law_presidential_republic
								has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
							}
						}
					}

						is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_secession
					}
				}
			}
		}

								count = 1
							}
						}
					}
					any_diplomatic_play = {
						initiator = root
						target = {
							AND = {
								exists = c:USA
								this = c:USA
								c:USA = {
									any_scope_state = {
										state_region = { NOT = { has_variable = district_of_columbia } }
										count = 1
									}
								}
							}
						}
						OR = {
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_secession
						}
					}
				}
		}
		localization_key = RU_CL_IY # й

				OR = {
					AND = {
					exists = c:BLG
					this = c:BLG
					}
					any_diplomatic_play = {
						initiator = root
						exists = c:BLG
						target = c:BLG
						OR = {
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_secession
						}
					}
				}
		}
		localization_key = RU_CL_IY # -й

				OR = {
					AND = {
					exists = c:PRG
					this = c:PRG
					}
					any_diplomatic_play = {
						initiator = root
						exists = c:PRG
						target = c:PRG
						OR = {
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_secession
						}
					}
				}
		}

				}

						NOT = {
							c:USA = {
								any_scope_state = {
									state_region = { NOT = { has_variable = district_of_columbia } }
									count = 1
								}
							}
						}
					}
					any_diplomatic_play = {
						initiator = root
						exists = c:USA
						target = c:USA
						NOT = {
							c:USA = {
								any_scope_state = {
									state_region = { NOT = { has_variable = district_of_columbia } }
									count = 1
								}
							}
						}
						OR = {
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_secession
						}
					}
				}
		}
		localization_key = RU_CL_FEM_I # и

						owns_entire_state_region = STATE_NORTH_SUMATRA
						owns_entire_state_region = STATE_SOUTH_SUMATRA
					}
					any_diplomatic_play = {
						initiator = root
						target = {
							AND = {
								OR = {
									AND = {
										exists = c:ACE
										this = c:ACE
									}
									AND = {
										exists = c:JMB
										this = c:JMB
									}
									AND = {
										exists = c:SAK
										this = c:SAK
									}
								}
								owns_entire_state_region = STATE_ACEH
								owns_entire_state_region = STATE_NORTH_SUMATRA
								owns_entire_state_region = STATE_SOUTH_SUMATRA
							}
						}
						OR = {
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_secession
						}
					}
				}
		}
		localization_key = RU_CL_ET # ет

				OR = {
					AND = {
					exists = c:IND
					this = c:IND
					}
					any_diplomatic_play = {
						initiator = root
						exists = c:IND
						target = c:IND
						OR = {
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
							is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_secession
						}
					}
				}
		}
		localization_key = RU_CL_ET # ет
	}

REPLACE:RU_CL_END_GUT = {
	type = country
	log_loc_errors = no

	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = root
			root = {
				is_secessionist = no
				is_revolutionary = yes
				ig:ig_devout = {
					is_in_government = yes
					is_strongest_ig_in_government = yes
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = RU_CL_GE
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = root
			root = {
				is_secessionist = no
				is_revolutionary = yes
				any_interest_group = {
					is_in_government = yes
					is_strongest_ig_in_government = yes
					OR = {
						has_ideology = ideology:ideology_liberal
						leader = {
							has_liberal_ideology = yes
							has_progressive_ideology = yes
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = RU_CL_GE
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			exists = root
			root = {
				is_secessionist = no
				is_revolutionary = yes

							OR = {
								has_diplomatic_pact = {
									who = c:KAZ
									type = puppet
									is_initiator = yes
								}
								has_diplomatic_pact = {
									who = c:KAZ
									type = dominion
									is_initiator = yes
								}
								has_diplomatic_pact = {
									who = c:KAZ
									type = protectorate
									is_initiator = yes
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				any_diplomatic_play = {
					initiator = root
					exists = c:KAZ
					target = {
						this = c:KAZ
						AND = {
							exists = c:RUS
							c:RUS = {
								NOR = {
									RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
									has_law = law_type:law_council_republic
								}
								OR = {
									has_diplomatic_pact = {
										who = c:KAZ
										type = puppet
										is_initiator = yes
									}
									has_diplomatic_pact = {
										who = c:KAZ
										type = dominion
										is_initiator = yes
									}
									has_diplomatic_pact = {
										who = c:KAZ
										type = protectorate
										is_initiator = yes
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					OR = {
						is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
						is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_secession
					}
				}
			}
		}

								is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_central_america
							}
							count > 1
						}
					}
				}
				any_diplomatic_play = {
					initiator = root
					exists = c:FND
					target = {
						this = c:FND
						c:FND = {
							OR = {
								was_formed_from = PLT
								was_formed_from = ARG
								was_formed_from = URU
								was_formed_from = PRG
							}
							any_scope_state = {
								is_incorporated = yes
								OR = {
									is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_north_america
									is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_central_america
								}
								count > 1
							}
						}
					}
					OR = {
						is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
						is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_secession
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = RU_CL_YT # ие
